morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Wednesday, May 06, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive
1. **Charter / Taylor — Counter expected by end of week (5/6-5/9); NBA scope reply still unsent.** Holden 5/5 00:21Z confirmed "made some good progress, hopefully something by end of week." First soft counter commitment since 4/15. NBA scope question (T-Wolves/Spurs: is EverPass the only commercial source for these exclusives?) has Ryan's reply drafted from 5/5 01:43Z and needs his send. NBC commercial grant confirmed does NOT include NBA per 2026-05-05 three-source verification.
2. **NESN — Plaehn chasing v7 response (2nd chase, 5/5 17:08Z).** Term sheet in NESN court since 4/12. Second direct chase now on record. Reputational window closing fast; respond within today or tomorrow.
3. **AccuWeather — McCormack scheduling Fri 5/8 call (5/5 01:50Z).** Proposed 9:00-10:30 AM PT or 12:30-1:30 PM PT Friday. Executable draft 11 days overdue (was due 4/25). Ryan owes scheduling reply today.
4. **Monumental — DocuSign pending Ryan signature.** Bernheimer 4/29 sent DocuSign; 5/1 follow-up logged. Tech integration in progress; July 2026 launch target at risk without execution. Sign or push back.
5. **Samsung CTV — Launch 5/20 (14 days out), Separate Agreement NOT executed.** Without execution before launch, Samsung standard TV Seller Office Terms apply automatically. Separate Agreement drafted but not executed. Needs legal close this week.

## Active Deal Status
- **Charter** (Active, Distribution): Counter expected 5/6-5/9 (Holden 5/5 ETA). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
- **DAZN** (Exploratory): Catch up rescheduled 5/5 to 5/7 10:30 (Gardiner). CONFLICT with Mediacom Discussion same slot 5/7 10:30. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
- **Apple** (Live): Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman + cross-team). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
- **AccuWeather** (Active, FAST): McCormack offering Fri 5/8 9:00-10:30 PT or 12:30-1:30 PT. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel; targeting late-May launch.
- **NESN** (Active, RSN): Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 17:08Z. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
- **Monumental** (Near Close, RSN): DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch.
- **Victory+** (Closed): NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02 via DocuSign. Monitoring only.
- **DIRECTV** (Legal Route Only): Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
- **Disney / ESPN** (Active, Content): Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.
- **NBCU / Peacock** (Active, Content): Upfront 5/11 streaming. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 5/5 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering. CRITICAL mortality risk; term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo).
- **Samsung** (Near Close, CTV): CTV launch 5/20 (14 days). Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
- **YES Network** (Active, RSN): Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options). Catch up next week.
- **Netflix Boxing** (Near Close): $500K cancellation fee on Mayweather/Pacquiao open; counter = MG credit toward future event.
- **YouTube TV** (Pre-Contract, Distribution): CRITICAL Aug 2026 NFL kickoff path. SKU pricing + firm date pending YTTV.
- **NBA League Pass** (Active, Content): #REF! errors in Pricing tab rows 101-102, 120 must be repaired before final pricing. AWS vs Uplynk ingest decision blocking.
- **CHSN** (Live, RSN): Steady-state loss vs forecast. Go/No-Go pending; price elasticity plateau above $75/mo.
- **Marquee / Sinclair** (Active, RSN): Apr 3 Sinclair redlines vs execution copy under review. Decide 2026 vs 2027 timing; package with CHSN.
- **WBD** (Active): Hoffberg rate card overdue 15+ days. Reassess WBD posture in light of WBD-Paramount shareholder vote outcome.
- **Comcast** (TBD): Amendment lapsed 4/15. Bounty + Sunday Ticket structure undefined.
- **MSG** (Active): Explore YES packaging; MPT/MG gap open.
- **NHL** (Active): Joe owes FCO schedule + ad guidelines + term sheet to Barbara/Greenberg.
- **MLB** (2027): Holding; struck $5M MG (per W18 sweep).
- **PokerGO** (FAST): Send cleaned contract w/ Q3 timing; DAI monetization draft.
- **FloSports** (Active, FAST): DAI dependency open.
- **Amazon Prime Video** (Active): Cumulative Redline.docx pending.
- **UFC / Deltatre** (Active): Upshow 4th Amendment review.
- **ISM Connect** (Active): Confirm amendment effective date + Nations League Exhibit A.
- **CW Sports / Nexstar** (Exploratory): Resolve "[Nextstar]" entity bracket; obtain rate card.
- **BravesVision** (Active): Cravens/Killebrew call; confirm DTV commercial exclusivity scope.
- **NFL Sunday Ticket (NFLE)** (Live): Monitor Year-5 EBITDA gate (Mar 31, 2028); DTV PR/USVI residential renewal.

items.text: Fully Executed Commercial Premises License in Place — EverPass and Amazon Content Services LLC have a fully executed Commercial Premises License Agreement covering TNF on Prime Video (NFL), NBA games (60+ regular season plus postseason), NASCAR Cup Series rac…

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Standalone CHSN Economics Are Loss-Making at Base-Case Attach Rates — Financial modeling (April 12, 2026 extraction) shows that at a 4% standalone attach rate, CHSN generates only 78 subscribers and a -$39,264 gross loss in FY27; the CHSN content fee of $49.6…

Co-Sell Pipeline Active — Chili's Identified as Priority Target — Charter (Spectrum) covers an estimated 84-85% of Chili's locations nationwide; EverPass and Charter discussed a joint pitch at approximately $1,400 per unit using Xumo Stream Box hardware with…

Amendment No. 1 Adds Comcast Sales Channel and Buy-Through Requirement — Amendment No. 1 (draft, April 3, 2026) significantly expands the original August 27, 2025 Referral Agreement: adds Comcast Sales as a direct sales/billing agent channel for all EverPass…

Active Legal Dispute — Audit Demand Letter Issued April 16 — EverPass issued a formal demand letter on April 16, 2026 invoking audit rights for the 2024-2025 NFL Season and declaring the 2023-2024 audit closed; DIRECTV owes an undisputed balance of $1,512,351…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

bridge_signals.title: Morning brief supplement — overnight Outlook + SharePoint signals
bridge_signals.summary: Three new partner signals overnight worth adding to the morning view: NESN flagged a counter on pricing escalator, ESPN/TWDC sent revised carriage exhibit comments, and Spectrum ad-sales pushed the DAI one-pager request.
key_points: NESN counter on 3.25x flat — wants two-year flat then escalator from year 3.
ESPN/TWDC revised carriage exhibit — comments mostly cosmetic, no scope shifts.
Spectrum ad-sales — DAI one-pager owed before next sync.
